code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initializing: App starts

    Initializing --> Loading: Load cached notifications
    Loading --> Subscribing: Cache loaded
    Loading --> Error: Load failed

    Subscribing --> Active: Subscriptions ready
    Subscribing --> Error: Subscription failed

    Active --> Active: New notification arrives
    Active --> Processing: User interaction
    Active --> Updating: Mark as read

    Processing --> Active: Interaction complete
    Updating --> Active: Update complete

    Active --> Cleanup: 30 days passed
    Cleanup --> Active: Old notifications removed

    Error --> Retrying: Retry after delay
    Retrying --> Subscribing: Retry attempt
    Retrying --> Failed: Max retries reached

    Failed --> [*]: Unrecoverable error

    state Active {
        [*] --> Unread
        Unread --> Read: Mark as read
        Read --> Archived: Archive
        Archived --> Deleted: Delete
        Deleted --> [*]
    }

    note right of Active
        Notification lifecycle:
        - Arrives as Unread
        - User marks as Read
        - Auto-archived after 7 days
        - Deleted after 30 days
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个通知中心的状态流转图。核心场景是：应用启动后先初始化，然后加载缓存，接着订阅推送服务。关键是Active状态内部还有子状态——未读、已读、已归档，最后删除。
明白了。我确认一下细节：Loading失败的话要进入Error状态对吧？还有，Active状态里从Unread到Read是用户手动标记，那Read到Archived是自动触发还是用户操作？
对，Loading失败进Error。Active内部的流转：Unread→Read是用户标记已读，Read→Archived是7天后自动归档，Archived→Deleted是30天后自动删除。另外Error状态要有重试机制，最多重试几次后进Failed终止。
好，我先画出主干：从初始状态到Initializing，再到Loading，成功后到Subscribing，就绪后进入Active。Active内部我放了子状态机，包含Unread、Read、Archived、Deleted四个状态。
等等，Active状态还需要处理两个外部事件：一是新通知到达时停留在Active（但内部新增Unread），二是用户交互时进入Processing状态，处理完回到Active。另外用户标记已读时要进入Updating状态。
加上了。Active自循环处理新通知到达，Processing处理用户交互，Updating处理标记已读操作，两者完成后都返回Active。Error分支我也补全了：Loading失败和Subscribing失败都进Error，然后Retrying，超次数后进Failed结束。
有个问题——30天后的清理逻辑不对。应该是Active状态下30天无操作进入Cleanup，清理旧通知后回到Active，而不是直接走Archived→Deleted那条线。Archived里的30天删除是单条通知的，Cleanup是批量清理。
修正了。现在Active可以转移到Cleanup（30天条件），Cleanup完成后返回Active。最后我在Active右侧加了个注释，说明通知生命周期：到达为未读→用户标记已读→7天后自动归档→30天后删除。
